headline: Final comfort polish adds skip links, safer small-screen tap behavior, iOS-friendly input sizing, and steadier horizontal controls across Magazine, result, and My Trips.
notes: Core pages now include skip links and main-content anchors so keyboard and assistive navigation can jump past the header cleanly.
Interactive controls use stronger touch-target behavior and reduced tap friction for cards, chips, buttons, and first-fold re-entry actions.
Small-screen inputs now keep a safer 16px size to avoid unintended mobile browser zoom during search, sharing, and planner edits.
Horizontal filter and jump rows now contain overscroll more safely, keeping Magazine, result, and My Trips calmer on narrow phones.
